title: Nextflow pipeline parameters
description: This pipeline uses Nextflow and processes some kind of data. The JSON Schema was built using the nf-core pipeline schema builder.

input_dir.help_text: This folder should contain either .ab1 files (if performing basecalling) or .fasta files (if not performing basecalling)

out_dir.help_text: The directory your results will be saved in (must be on **VAST** not stornext)

basecall.help_text: If true, basecalling will be performed with tracy (https://www.gear-genomics.com/docs/tracy/). This requires .ab1 files and will allow QC to be performed

igblast_db.help_text: Alpaca database is included by default. If you want to use a custom database, place it in the same directory or edit this parameter
